title: Kerala to begin social security pension distribution of July from Friday; ₹941.73 cr sanctioned
summary: Kerala's government will disburse ₹941.73 crore for July's social security pensions to over 5.1 million recipients, with funds going directly to bank accounts or via doorstep cash delivery by August 3.
